🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 88, TS 30); strong recent form, fit and race-ready; going conditions are ideal.

📰 He has improved for gelding/wind operations, winning a 7f handicap at Kempton and a 1m Listed event at Southwell this winter; narrowly denied in the Winter Derby six weeks ago (not a vintage renewal); the demands of this race should be more suitable and he still has Pattern-race aspirations; he'll need to be a Group horse to give the weight away all round but he is an each-way contender at the very least; cheekpieces now added.

🧠 Well-rated for this grade (RPR 99, TS 90); on a declining curve, fit and race-ready; good course record; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.

  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",
    "time": "1:15",
    "race_name": "BetMGM Burradon Stakes (Listed Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Andab",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "4621-2",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "68.9",
        "model_pct": "37.3%",
        "fair_odds": "2.68",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made the frame in three Group races on turf before Listed win at Dundalk (7f, Polytrack) last October; went close in Local Group 2 in Qatar (1m) in February and this Irish challenger holds leading claims under a 3lb penalty."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "New Monarch",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "2244-1",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Zamindar",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "64.5",
        "model_pct": "17.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.77",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive in defeat on turf across his four 2yo starts and he reappeared with a novice win at Kempton (7f, Polytrack) 16 days ago, when odds-on; further improvement is necessary if he's to follow up today, but that can't be ruled out and there's every chance 1m will be fine; yard in good form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Billecart",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4-1",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "63.8",
        "model_pct": "15.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.58",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-16.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising fourth at Newmarket (7f, good to firm) last July on sole 2yo start and he easily justified 1-6 odds in a four-runner novice over this C&D four weeks ago; today is a much tougher test of his credentials but this 2,000 Guineas entry could have plenty more to offer for his top northern yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Jel Pepper",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Oliver Cole",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "13471-",
        "sire": "Inns Of Court",
        "dam_sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "61.1",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.50",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third in the Group 2 July Stakes at Newmarket (6f) last July and tapped back into that promise, and more, to win valuable sales race on the other course there (7f) in October; there can be optimism he will be suited by the step up to 1m and he could be in the mix if fully tuned up on his return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Alarming",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "2413-3",
        "sire": "A'Ali",
        "dam_sire": "Honor Code",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "60.8",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "11.03",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+6.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Kempton novice (7f, Polytrack) last October on her third start and she's been third in Listed races at Saint-Cloud on both starts since (7f/1m, heavy), albeit without seriously threatening on either occasion; in good hands to continue to progress and she might not be far away."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Timeforshowcasing",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "11951-",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Raven's Pass",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "59.3",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.42",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins from her five 2yo starts, including on Polytrack (sole run on AW) and a fillies' series final at Goodwood (7f) in September when last seen; not beaten far when fifth in the Group 2 May Hill at Doncaster (1m) on penultimate outing and she could be involved on this reappearance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Padraig Dawn",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Charlie Pike",
        "ts": "30",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Powerscourt",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "57.0",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.30",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Recovered from slow start to win at 11-5 on debut at Southwell (7f, Tapeta) in February, keeping on well and shaping as though he'd be suited by 1m; others have far greater substance to their form but he's very unexposed and his dam Termagent was a Group 1 winner; not discounted."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Curragh",
    "time": "1:22",
    "race_name": "Curragh On Course Bookmakers Supporting Free Admission Irish EBF Maiden",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Soft",
    "class": "",
    "draw_bias": "high",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "New Yorker",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "55.3",
        "model_pct": "19.9%",
        "fair_odds": "5.04",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-17.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second foal; dam 5f/6f winner (inc 2yo/Group 1; RPR 112), sister to useful 5f/6f winner Atletico, half-sister to Australian 7f Group 2 winner Now Or Never, out of unraced half-sister to 6f-7f Group 1 winner Dream Ahead; dam a G1-winning juvenile for this yard and bred to be sharp; first string on jockey bookings; yard's juveniles come on plenty for debuts but a huge player with Moore in the saddle."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Confucius",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "53.3",
        "model_pct": "16.4%",
        "fair_odds": "6.10",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-7.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1,700,000gns yearling; third foal; half-brother to 7f winner Alfareqa (RPR 89); dam 5f/6f winner (inc 2yo Group 1 Cheveley Park; 115), half-sister to three winners from 7f to 1m4f; expensive purchase and dam G1-winning juvenile; top yard whose juveniles usually come on plenty for experience; one of two similarly excellently-bred types for yard and second string on jockey bookings."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Edward Thatch",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Robson De Aguiar",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Blackbeard",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "13.9%",
        "fair_odds": "7.19",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-16.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Cost 70,000euros as a yearling; fifth foal; dam unraced sister to winners Iberia (useful 7f 2yo), World Famous (9.4f) and Perfect Light (8.4f/1m2f), out of 6f Group 3 winning close relative to dam of US 1m Grade 2 winner Giocoso; one of two for a yard that does very well with 2yos; sire had first winner in France last weekend; first string on jockey bookings."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Santorini Storm",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "J P Murtagh",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Soldier's Call",
        "dam_sire": "Sir Prancealot",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "47.6",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.64",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "20,000euros yearling; third foal; brother to Listed-placed 5f/6f winner World Of Darcy (inc 2yo; RPR 90); dam 6f winner (inc AW; 81), out of maiden half-sister to 1m Listed winner Baltic Knight; will need to be well above-average to win this; market can guide."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "New Mexico",
        "jockey": "Donagh O'Connor",
        "trainer": "Robson De Aguiar",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Dandy Man",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "47.2",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "11.01",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "105,000gns yearling; first foal; dam 6f AW winner (RPR 79), half-sister to Italian 1m winner Blue Saphira, out of 1m winning half-sister to winners Alkior (5f/6f), Flying Hammer (7f/1m) and Rowan Brae (Listed-placed 1m 2yo); second string for yard on jockey bookings; new sire."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Two Brigade",
        "jockey": "Leigh Roche",
        "trainer": "M D O'Callaghan",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Bachelor Duke",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "46.9",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.38",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Invincible Army colt, half-brother to five winners inc Catch Cunningham (5f inc 2yo/AW; RPR 87) and Palenville (6f 2yo; 79); dam placed 5f/6f AW (67), half-sister to 7f 2yo Group 2 winner Etlaala and to dam of outstanding 5f performer Battaash; bred to be precocious and sharp; yard gets first-time-out winners."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Fiery Anne",

        "trainer": "John C McConnell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Equiano filly, half-sister to winners Kendaya (French/Spanish 6f), Iskra One (Polish 6f) and Urban Soul (Greek 7f); dam unraced half-sister to 7f 2yo/1m4f winner, out of 6f 2yo winning half-sister to Irish Derby runner-up Definite Article; best watched on debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Lars Soldier",
        "jockey": "Wesley Joyce(3)",
        "trainer": "Michael Mulvany",
        "ts": "22",
        "rpr": "59",
        "or": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Buratino",

        "fair_odds": "13.71",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3,500euros yearling; first foal; dam unraced half-sister to prolific/useful 5f winner (inc 2yo) Lord Riddiford; showed promise when beaten 8l into fourth over C&D 19 days ago, sticking to task well having been keen; experience a benefit but up against some potentially smart newcomers."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Santo Parvenue",
        "jockey": "Jamie Powell",
        "trainer": "Eddie & Patrick Harty",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",

        "stall": 2,

        "edge": "+6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "7,000euros yearling; third foal; brother to 7f winner Toy Soldier (inc 2yo; RPR 81); dam 7f AW winner (86), half-sister to winners Lady Camelot (7f 2yo and 2m4f hurdle) and Jocks Wa Hae (1m1f), out of Listed-placed 7f winner; yard does well with 2yos but likely to come on for first run and need further in time."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Lingfield (AW)",
    "time": "1:30",
    "race_name": "BetMGM All-Weather Vase Fillies' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Lady Dora Mae",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(5)",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "49",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "7-211",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "63.2",
        "model_pct": "20.6%",
        "fair_odds": "4.85",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Only made her debut in November and bids for a hat-trick after winning a Southwell novice (1m, Tapeta) in January and a four-runner Kempton handicap (7f, Polytrack) by a short head last month; not sure this sharp 7f is completely ideal, but likely there is more to come from her."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Cool Molly",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Ollie Sangster",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "2-1512",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Requinto",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "61.9",
        "model_pct": "18.1%",
        "fair_odds": "5.53",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "+4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has proved most consistent since her debut in October including wins at Chelmsford (5f, Polytrack) in January and here (6f) the following month; should stay this far, but she has an awkward draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Handle With Care",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Marco Botti",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "761-34",
        "sire": "Advertise",
        "dam_sire": "Society Rock",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "56.5",
        "model_pct": "10.9%",
        "fair_odds": "9.15",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has done most of her racing over shorter, but she made all over C&D in December and was beaten just a head by Lady Manzor in this race last year when, like the winner, she was drawn wide; 2lb lower this time around and high on the list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Party Bear",
        "jockey": "Jack Nicholls(5)",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "621435",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Royal Applause",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "54.6",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "11.02",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned to winning form over C&D in January and had genuine excuses for two of her three defeats in the meantime; beaten just a short head and a neck into third of 11 in the Fillies and Mares Trial here in between those efforts with two of these behind; leading player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Dandy Khan",
        "jockey": "Pat Cosgrave",
        "trainer": "Jim Boyle",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "571535",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Dalakhani",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.26",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has nothing to prove under the conditions having won five times over 7f-1m here during the winter, but they were all at Class 6 level and she may again find this sort of company a shade warm."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "So Sassy",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "34-274",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "50.3",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.56",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just 1lb higher than for her sole success here (6f) in August last year, but her only previous run over this far was inconclusive as regards stamina; visor given a go."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Mereside Diva",
        "jockey": "William Pyle(3)",
        "trainer": "David & Nicola Barron",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "-92317",
        "sire": "Ivawood",
        "dam_sire": "Mujahid",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "50.0",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "17.07",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended a 16-race losing run in a four-runner contest at Newcastle (7f, Tapeta; first-time blinkers) in February, but could manage only seventh of 11 when sent off 5-2 favourite for the Fillies and Mares Trial over C&D five weeks ago (Party Bear third); needs to bounce back."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Lady Manzor",
        "jockey": "Jack Dace(5)",
        "trainer": "Amanda Perrett",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "245-86",
        "sire": "Almanzor",
        "dam_sire": "Motivator",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.40",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not at her best lately including when finishing behind two of these in the Fillies and Mares Trial here in February, but she is a dual C&D winner including when defying stall 14 in this race last year; still 3lb higher, but better drawn this time and cheekpieces are given a go; no great surprise if she figures."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Elizabetty",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "7-7139",
        "sire": "Inns Of Court",
        "dam_sire": "Trade Fair",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-5",
        "score": "49.4",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.00",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All six AW starts have come at Newcastle, winning a 7f novice there in January; returns from wind surgery but has plenty to prove under these conditions."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Bella Bisbee",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "-26055",
        "sire": "Muhaarar",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "46.3",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.20",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Should appreciate the return to this trip having attempted an extended 1m1f last time, but her recent form has been up and down and the outside stall won't make things any easier."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Madame De Sevigne",
        "jockey": "Darragh Keenan",
        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "284-07",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "46.3",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.20",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual 7f winner on turf, but 0-6 on the AW albeit runner-up on three occasions; hasn't shown much in two starts for this yard, though, and others make greater appeal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Searchingtheblues",
        "jockey": "Tyler Heard",
        "trainer": "Mark Usher",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "9835-5",
        "sire": "Due Diligence",
        "dam_sire": "Refuse To Bend",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "42.3",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "35.40",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Landed her first two starts in 7f novices at Kempton (Polytrack) and Wolverhampton (Tapeta) in July 2024, but her form has been patchy in an abbreviated career since; returns from another 74 days off."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",
    "time": "1:50",
    "race_name": "BetMGM All-Weather 3 Year Old Championships Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",

    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Al Najashi",

        "trainer": "Ollie Sangster",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "4-1111",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-11",

        "fair_odds": "6.29",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "4-4 since fitted with a tongue tie and switched to handicaps; now a whopping 32lb higher than when his winning sequence began and he is tackling much stronger opposition this afternoon but he barely broke sweat last time and his ceiling is yet to be established."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Three Non Blondes",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "1-21",
        "sire": "Ubettabelieveit",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "68.6",
        "model_pct": "14.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.15",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a winning debut at Chelmsford in December (6f) before chasing home Riley Rocks (winner off a BHA mark of 75 since) over C&D on New Year's Day; made all for a smooth success in a 7f handicap at Wolverhampton nine weeks ago; up 8lb but still has potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Ten Carat Harry",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "Jamie Osborne",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "97",
        "form": "111-13",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Broken Vow",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "64.8",
        "model_pct": "9.3%",
        "fair_odds": "10.73",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His winning spree came to an end but he emerged with plenty of credit following his third in a 7f Listed event at Lingfield five weeks ago; another personal best will be required if he's to win giving weight away all round but he continues to thrive on racing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Sparksmith",
        "jockey": "Harry Vigors(7)",
        "trainer": "James Ferguson",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "3-212",
        "sire": "Hello Youmzain",
        "dam_sire": "Medaglia d'Oro",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "64.6",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.91",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He has improved his RPR with each of his four starts, the latest when beaten a nose at Kempton last month on handicap debut (6f); up 2lb but has a promising 7lb claimer booked; can do better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Cotai Lights",
        "jockey": "Barry McHugh",
        "trainer": "Adrian Paul Keatley",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "71-33",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-6",
        "score": "64.3",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.34",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "8lb better off with Silent Strike for 3l on their C&D run last month; solid third at Naas on recent handicap debut (7f, soft); drop back in trip not sure to suit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Silent Strike",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "212",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Clodovil",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "64.2",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.36",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-14.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sent off favourite for all three starts (6f), confirming the promise of his debut second when easily scoring at Kempton in February; similar form when second over C&D four weeks ago, giving best only to a promising filly; still has potential and while this opening mark wouldn't look an obvious gift, his trainer/jockey have combined to win both runnings of this race since it became a handicap and they also won the 2023 renewal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Northern Empire",
        "jockey": "Ashley Lewis(5)",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "42-1",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Aussie Rules",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "62.7",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.35",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise in his first two starts (7f/1m) and took a step forward when winning a good novice at Lingfield in January (7f), making all and finding plenty; should be quick enough for 6f and connections should have a good marker as Lord Harcourt, who also runs in these colours, has form that ties in with several of the runners."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Monarch's Gold",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Kevin Philippart De Foy",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "121-52",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "60.2",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.50",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2-3 as a 2yo; creditable fifth to Ten Carat Harry over C&D in January (handicap debut) before bumping into one at Southwell three weeks ago; cheekpieces need to prompt improvement."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Saffron Dandy",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "60-116",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "58.1",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.79",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won her first two starts this year, over 6f at Wolverhampton and at Lingfield; came up shy in her hat-trick bid at Southwell three weeks ago (met some trouble) but could be suited by today's stiffer test."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Jungle Ruler",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "1-144",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "56.4",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.16",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Debut win for Joseph O'Brien at Dundalk (7f) last October; ready win at Southwell on stable debut (6f) in January and ran well under a double penalty at Lingfield two weeks later; finished behind two of today's rivals when fourth at Southwell three weeks ago; needs to raise his game but that is possible."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Justmyluck",
        "jockey": "Alex Jary(3)",
        "trainer": "Linda Perratt",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "523-15",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-2",
        "score": "55.4",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.98",
        "best_dec": "67.00",
        "edge": "+3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made all to win a 5f handicap here in January but only fifth of seven at Wolverhampton last time; others are open to greater progress."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,

        "ts": "100",

        "fair_odds": "30.49",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran well but finished behind Ten Carat Harry in his first three handicaps and he was fourth to Saffron Dandy at Lingfield last time; needs to find extra to win."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,

        "ts": "81",

        "dam_sire": "No Nay Never",
        "stall": 12,

        "fair_odds": "32.04",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins in maiden/novice company; has shown promise in handicaps, including her Kempton third last month when she couldn't quite sustain the big move she made in the penultimate furlong; has a better chance than her odds may imply; stable also runs Al Najashi."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three fair efforts this year but without suggesting he was well enough handicapped for a race of this nature."
      }

  {
    "course": "Curragh",
    "time": "1:57",
    "race_name": "1xBet.ie Supports Safe Gambling Irish EBF Fillies Sprint Handicap",

    "dist": "6f",

    "class": "",
    "draw_bias": "high",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Josh's Joy",
        "jockey": "Gavin Ryan",
        "trainer": "Donnacha Aidan O'Brien",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "86",
        "form": "3231-",

        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 6,

        "fair_odds": "8.71",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive filly at two, sent off fairly short prices for all of her four runs and gained a deserved victory at Naas (6f, yielding) in October when making all; form of her penultimate third at Cork looks very strong; fair mark on handicap debut and receives the 3yo allowance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Oh Cecelia",
        "jockey": "Jamie Powell",
        "trainer": "K J Condon",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "636-61",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "58.6",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.09",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 5f Cork maiden last May before being set an ambitious task in the Albany Stakes; change of scenery did the trick as won on debut for this yard 12 days ago at Naas (5f, soft); should stay this far but 7lb rise to overcome."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Glory To Be",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "M C Grassick",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "42310-",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "56.9",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.20",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent filly gained a deserved breakthrough win in Navan maiden (5f, soft) in October under this rider, getting up on post; struggled on handicap debut here behind Staysound Susie but met some interference; could go well from 3lb lower on return; cheekpieces replace blinkers."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Staysound Susie",
        "jockey": "Jimmy Dalton(7)",
        "trainer": "Andrew Slattery",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "391-53",
        "sire": "U S Navy Flag",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.27",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-10.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 5f course handicap (heavy) on final run of 2025 off 8lb lower; needed her seasonal return but eyecatching effort here over 5f six days ago when third of 14, finishing off to good effect; should be bang there for stable in terrific form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Likedbymike",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "M J Byrne",
        "ts": "90",

        "fair_odds": "13.06",

        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive sprinter last year who knocked on the door in handicaps, collared on post at Cork (6f) and back over 5f at Naas produced with every chance when just held for second; behind Staysound Susie here when last seen but player on return if she's ready to roll; booking of Colin Keane a plus."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Varshini",

        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gowran maiden winner ended last season with two fair efforts in Listed company; tailed off on return when sent off favourite for 7f Naas handicap 12 days ago; cheekpieces are reached for now."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "edge": "-6.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second runner for yard; 0-7 for Dermot Weld but off the mark on third attempt for this yard when scoring at 50-1 in 1m Dundalk handicap in December; fair fifth from 5lb higher back there next time; not sure to translate that form to turf; 3lb wrong."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 6f Naas handicap off 1lb higher in April 2024; best form last season was on seasonal debut when third over C&D off 78; went close on C&D return last month and fair effort after a slow start at Naas 12 days ago; player despite being 5lb wrong."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "edge": "+5.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won twice on turf last year over 1m, the latest at Navan off 75 in October (yielding); rounded off the year below her best; she had some good form over this trip as a juvenile so not discounted on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gained first win at Cork off 67 last August (5f, good) and ended last season with a fine second here behind Staysound Susie (5f, heavy), overcoming a slow start and headed late on; finished last on return last season; market will guide."
      },
      {

        "spotlight": "Won by 8l off 68 at Limerick last June (7f, good); handicapper took a dim view (18lb rise) and she hasn't been competitive since; may need more respite from the assessor and prefers decent ground."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three-time winner at 5f on good and yielding ground, including at this venue; struggled in two tries on testing ground, including on return over C&D last month; can only be watched at present."

      }

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unexposed 4yo who has proved consistent on the AW so far (232441); had only a nose to spare at Wolverhampton (1m6f, Tapeta) last month, but is just 2lb higher and may still have more to offer upped again in trip; respected."

      {
        "rank": 2,

        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3-3 last month including a win over C&D; had only a neck to spare in a four-runner event at Southwell (1m6f, Tapeta) eight days ago and is now 11lb higher including his 5lb penalty, but the ceiling of his ability on the AW is still to be established."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Saw his race out well when successful at Southwell (2m2f, Tapeta) last month and is 1-1 here, having won over this trip in January; up another 3lb, but still one for the shortlist."
      },

        "rank": 4,

        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mainly consistent on the AW and was only around half a length behind Shrimp Shady when fourth of eight at Wolverhampton (1m6f, Tapeta) last month, but she finished last of 14 in this race last year which does leave her with a bit to prove."
      },
      {

        "edge": "+3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Out-and-out stayer who won twice at Newcastle (2m, Tapeta) at the start of the year, but he looks high enough in the weights now and makes a belated Polytrack debut."

        "edge": "+2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Something of a Wolverhampton specialist (3-5) though he has won on Polytrack at Kempton; the drop to 1m4f didn't help last time so the return to a longer distance should help, but his high draw may not be ideal even over this trip."
      },

        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three course wins have come over 1m4f, but he has won over this sort of trip elsewhere; finished half a length behind St Faz when third of four at Southwell (1m6f, Tapeta) and now 11lb better off; each-way claims."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced since her debut early last year, winning at Kempton (1m, Polytrack) and Newcastle (1m2f, Tapeta); steps up another half-mile in trip, but she shapes like a stayer and is worthy of respect, especially if strong in the market; cheekpieces are given a go."
      },

        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Irish challenger who has become all-or-nothing, suddenly bouncing back to winning form at Dundalk (2m, Polytrack) four weeks ago; 3lb lower than when sixth of 12 in this race two years ago; not quite sure what to expect."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",

        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three-time winner over 1m4f/1m5f here and Taryn Langley gets on well with him, but he has never attempted this far before and he must put an uncharacteristically poor effort at Newcastle 13 days ago behind him."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Often a front-runner; 1lb lower than when twice runner-up at Wolverhampton (1m6f/16.5f) during the winter and didn't enjoy much luck when behind a couple of these there last month, but the outside stall won't make things easy."

        "cd": "",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2-2 at Newcastle, recording wide-margin handicap wins over 1m in November and this trip in the trial in January; the form of the latest win is unconvincing, however, and she had been beaten by Bridget's View at Southwell on her penultimate start; has to be respected but this will require another step forward."
      },

        "rank": 2,

        "model_pct": "15.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.58",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Coped well with the rise in class at Lingfield five weeks ago, finishing with a flourish and nabbing Powdering close home; that was her first attempt at 7f, and in a hood, and she could have more to offer at the trip."
      },

        "rank": 3,

        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "63.3",
        "model_pct": "13.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.39",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four wins and a second from her five AW runs at Dundalk, including 7f and 1m wins in her two runs in 2026; back against her own sex today and likely to go close."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Callianassa",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "103-15",
        "sire": "Invincible Army",
        "dam_sire": "Intikhab",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "59.1",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.58",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Her three course wins have come over a mile, the latest when beating Dosman (runs in the 3.00) in February; slightly disappointing here four weeks ago but she is back against her own sex and not handicapped out of things."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Brazilian Rose",
        "jockey": "Kaiya Fraser",
        "trainer": "Rebecca Menzies",

        "rpr": "102",

        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.70",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fifth of 14 in the corresponding race 12 months ago when rated 6lb lower; four wins at Southwell this year, the latest over 6f three weeks ago, but that shorter trip probably suits her better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Fouette",
        "jockey": "Jack Mitchell",
        "trainer": "James Horton",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "/1165-",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.76",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Impressed at Southwell in October (after a 425-day layoff) and defied market weakness in a Chelmsford handicap three weeks later (both 7f); returns to handicap company off a 15lb higher mark than for the second win but that is a result of two fine runs in Listed company since; raced freely under a more prominent ride than usual at Deauville last time; could benefit from a return to hold-up tactics and she isn't fully exposed just yet."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Paris Babe",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "101",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "91",
        "form": "710-45",

        "dam_sire": "Olympic Glory",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "57.0",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.35",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins in France last year, including on the AW at Deauville (6.5f); two creditable efforts this year before changing hands for 32,000euros in February; thrown into a tough race on her stable debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Indigo Dream",

        "trainer": "Ross O'Sullivan",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "82",

        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "56.8",
        "model_pct": "5.3%",
        "fair_odds": "18.78",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't have to improve to win a 7f maiden at Dundalk in December; 5.25l behind Stateira when third over C&D 11 weeks ago; a career best will be required today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Bridget's View",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Stuart Williams",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "/91-55",
        "sire": "Sergei Prokofiev",
        "dam_sire": "Redback",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "56.7",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.05",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "AW maiden winner as a 2yo; returned from a seven-month absence to beat Stateira by 4.25l at Southwell in December (1m) and she is 1lb better off with that rival today; not beaten far in a blanket finish at Lingfield five weeks ago (7f; stable debut) and this stiffer test should suit; one to consider with a tongue tie now fitted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Powdering",

        "trainer": "Michael Herrington",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "103",

        "form": "46-692",

        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "55.9",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.36",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "She has had plenty of racing but she retains plenty of ability and went agonisingly close at Lingfield five weeks ago, pipped at the post by Ziggy's Queen; should give it another good go."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Shallow",

        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "103",

        "fair_odds": "35.58",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran a cracker when fourth at York's Ebor meeting (7f) and now rated 6lb lower; she hasn't been at her best yet this year though and a full revival is required."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 2-5 since being gelded when winning at Wolverhampton (6f, Tapeta) a fortnight ago; he's won twice on Polytrack at Dundalk; this in-form Irish challenger holds solid claims up 4lb for last time."
      },
      {

        "fair_odds": "6.38",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended a long losing run at Newcastle (6f, Tapeta) in January and he also won at Wolverhampton (6f, Tapeta) in February; he's continued in good form on Tapeta on his last two starts and is also effective over this C&D; might have a part to play."
      },

        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Below best on both runs this year but failed to settle at Kempton last time, when a wide draw also didn't help; twice went close at Kempton (6f) towards the end of last year and this C&D winner is not written off."

      {

        "fair_odds": "17.59",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over C&D last June on sole previous course visit and in good form at end of 2025; can be forgiven his run at Newcastle on New Year's Day as he was hampered; could be a contender if fully tuned up after three-month break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Justcallmepete",

        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "11-454",

        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner who won three in a row over 6f on Polytrack elsewhere at the end of last year; some reasonable efforts since but needs to build on those if he's to return to winning ways today; withdrawn at Kempton last month when his nose was stuck in the stall (18-1 at the time)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Moulin Booj",

        "fair_odds": "20.61",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Wolverhampton (5f, Tapeta) last month and he failed to settle when well beaten from a wide draw over 6f there next time; however, all of his wins have come at 5f and he has something to prove kept to 6f."
      },
      {

        "dam_sire": "Compton Place",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.22",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over 5f here in January and rallied for 1l second of five over 5f here last time; it's possible 5f is his optimum trip nowadays but he won over today's C&D in 2024 and could be in the shake-up if seeing it out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Intervention",
        "jockey": "Conor Whiteley(7)",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "762780",
        "sire": "Swiss Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Catcher In The Rye",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.59",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "9yo who is inconsistent and hasn't shone on his last three starts but he went close at Kempton (6f) in February and he's finished in the first two on seven of his 11 previous runs on the AW here (including when runner-up in this in 2024); he's well worth a second look now back here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Apache Outlaw",
        "jockey": "Rory Mulligan(5)",
        "trainer": "Adrian McGuinness",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "74-368",

        "dam_sire": "Intense Focus",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "50.4",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.38",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Without a win since landing two in a row on the Dundalk Polytrack (6f/7f) in late 2024, and below par there in February last time; however, he's produced some positive performances this winter and has edged back down the weights; might not be far away."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Uncle Don",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Robert Cowell",
        "ts": "86",

        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-13.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2yo Listed runner-up in September 2024 for Richard Fahey; 0-9 last year but has a dangerous mark to work with on his first start for a new trainer, who can do well with recruits from other yards (remains in the same ownership); interesting, all the more so if attracting market support."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Chancellor",

        "rpr": "119",

        "fair_odds": "6.57",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He has improved for gelding/wind operations, winning a 7f handicap at Kempton and a 1m Listed event at Southwell this winter; narrowly denied in the Winter Derby six weeks ago (not a vintage renewal); the demands of this race should be more suitable and he still has Pattern-race aspirations; he'll need to be a Group horse to give the weight away all round but he is an each-way contender at the very least; cheekpieces now added."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "First Principle",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "92",

        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "69.1",
        "model_pct": "11.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.71",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He has a good record on AW, winning three times and runner-up on his other two attempts; got the better of Dosman at Wolverhampton two weeks ago but he looks held by The Lost King on their Lincoln Trial form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The form of his Kempton win (7f) in January could hardly have worked out better and he raised his game again to win the Lincoln Trial at Wolverhampton four weeks ago; still not fully exposed and he is a leading contender up 5lb."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "ts": "97",

        "stall": 13,

        "fair_odds": "10.67",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The winner of four of his eight starts and he had a bit to spare when rewarding odds-on favourite backers at Southwell on New Year's Day; unlikely this mark will prove beyond him in time; solid candidate."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Dosman",
        "jockey": "Jonny Peate",
        "trainer": "Oli Rix",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "8-3212",

        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "8-9",

        "fair_odds": "10.90",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+5.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Coaxed back to form by his new trainer, twice placed over C&D before winning at Southwell in February; good second behind First Principle two weeks ago; another 2lb rise tempers enthusiasm slightly."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Tyrrhenian Sea",

        "trainer": "Roger Varian",
        "ts": "107",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "7832-2",

        "fair_odds": "13.07",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "As reliable as they come on AW, winning five of his 16 starts in this sphere and second or third on a further nine occasions; has a rare handicap run today but he looks held by Chancellor on their Southwell clash in February (3lb better off for a length but the winner had a bit to spare)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "ts": "78",

        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time course winner, the latest when recording a last-gasp success over 7f four weeks ago; 2lb higher mark to contend with in a stronger race; bettering last season's sixth would be a solid effort."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "ts": "89",

        "fair_odds": "17.28",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising stable debut at Kempton in January and he easily won a 1m maiden at Chelmsford in early February; only second to a stablemate back at Chelmsford for his handicap debut three weeks ago; can win more races but probably not this one."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Storm Star",

        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "98",

        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He was completing a C&D hat-trick when winning the corresponding race 12 months ago off a 3lb lower mark; not at his best in two runs this year (following a gelding operation) and he needs to raise his game."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished a good third in this race 12 months ago when rated 2lb lower; arrives in good form, having beaten Popmaster at Lingfield (1m) before a good third at Kempton (7f) 16 days ago; chance if stall 1 proves no hindrance."

        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Arrives in fine form, beating The Lost King at Kempton in February and runner-up on his two runs since; sneaking back up the weights and he was only fifth in this race 12 months ago off today's mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ready winner of the trial over C&D in January and a 3lb rise isn't beyond him on that evidence; two lesser efforts have followed (sustained a small wound to his right-hind fetlock last time) but his fine record at Newcastle means he can't be discounted."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a Class 4 over C&D in September; unplaced in three runs this year, the latest here last week, and this looks a tough race in which to try to rebound."

      }

  {
    "course": "Curragh",
    "time": "3:07",
    "race_name": "Irish Stallion Farms EBF Park Express Stakes (Group 3) (Fillies & Mares)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Soft",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "stands_side",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Faiyum",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "G M Lyons",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "111",
        "form": "1121-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "67.5",
        "model_pct": "26.4%",
        "fair_odds": "3.79",
        "best_dec": "1.91",
        "edge": "-32.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Enjoyed a hugely promising campaign last season, landing a Naas maiden and Killarney conditions race impressively before finishing 1.25l second to subsequent Group 1 winner Barnavara in Naas Group 3; finished off with a smart performance in Group 3 at Gowran over extended 1m1f, powering 7l clear (RPR 114); drop in trip no problem and the one to beat on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Moments Of Joy",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "1325-",
        "sire": "Justify",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "63.1",
        "model_pct": "14.8%",
        "fair_odds": "6.77",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Leopardstown maiden winner on debut; progressed to be placed in Chesham at Royal Ascot (beaten 2.25l into third) and in a Group 3 over C&D (beaten 2.25l into second); ran with credit when fifth in Fillies' Mile behind stablemate Precise 175 days ago; stable first string and should go well, although soft ground an unknown."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Catalina Delcarpio",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "P Twomey",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "123-",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Camelot",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "61.4",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.53",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Reached a very useful level in three starts last season, landing 1m2f Leopardstown maiden before beaten 2.75l into second in Group 3 at Navan; stepped up in trip and beaten 2-1 favourite when third in the Ribblesdale Stakes at Ascot when last seen 288 days ago; open to further improvement; acts on soft; yard won this last year; trip may be a bit sharp on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "She's A Nation",
        "jockey": "Luke McAteer",
        "trainer": "Rory Anthony Devine",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "13-",
        "sire": "Sioux Nation",
        "dam_sire": "Excellent Art",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "60.8",
        "model_pct": "10.9%",
        "fair_odds": "9.20",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "An impressive maiden winner over C&D in June; coped well with step up in class and far softer ground when 10l third to Faiyum at Gowran Park lto; off 195 days; down in trip; progressive type but likely to struggle to turn the tables with Faiyum off 3lb better terms."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Princess Child",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "2114-7",
        "sire": "Dariyan",
        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "59.5",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.90",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+7.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved throughout campaign last season, landing competitive handicap at Galway over 7f and following up in Group 3 company at Tipperary before another good effort when fourth in Group 2 at Longchamp; beaten 6l into seventh on return at this track six days ago; should improve for that and step up in trip too; enjoys soft ground and fitness edge; player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Cameo",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "86",
        "form": "0314-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "58.4",
        "model_pct": "7.9%",
        "fair_odds": "12.63",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive in maidens last season, coping well with testing ground when landing 7f maiden at this track on third run by 2.25l in October; below that level when last seen 164 days ago, beaten 10.5l into fourth in Group 3 as 2-1 favourite; second string for stable."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "California Dreamer",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Robson De Aguiar",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "104",
        "form": "0700-1",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Giant's Causeway",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "56.7",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.88",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual winner on the AW who has ran some cracking races in defeat; standout effort when 2.25l second to Lake Victoria in Irish 1,000 Guineas over C&D in May; didn't go on from that run last season but made a smooth return to action when landing 1m conditions race at Dundalk easily 28 days ago; first-time visor applied; soft ground a worry."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Bubble Gum",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "J P Murtagh",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "36/15-",
        "sire": "Cloth Of Stars",
        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "55.8",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.97",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished midfield in French and German Oaks in 2024; Listed winner at Cork for Paddy Twomey last April; below that form when fifth in Munster Oaks on last start 294 days ago; trip may be on the short side on stable debut for Johnny Murtagh."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Celestial Orbit",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "99",

        "fair_odds": "20.17",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two-time winner for Ollie Sangster in Britain, including Listed Star Stakes at Sandown in July 2024; last seen 145 days ago finishing 2.5l second to Moon Cloud in Listed mile contest at Saint-Cloud; trainer does very well with recruits, particularly fillies; acts on soft; interesting contender."
      },
      {

        "fair_odds": "42.59",
        "best_dec": "101.00",
        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole win in 14 starts came in Dundalk AW maiden in February of last year; highly tried since, best run over C&D last April when beaten 2.25l into fourth by One Look in this race last year; returned on the AW 28 days ago when beaten 4l into fifth by stablemate California Dreamer; needs plenty more."
      }
    ]
  },

      {

        "spotlight": "Losing run now up to 14, but his last couple of efforts have been encouraging as when second of six in a slightly stronger contest at Chelmsford (1m2f, Polytrack) last month; still on his last winning mark and holds each-way claims."
      },
      {

  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Rewarded strong market support in game fashion at Southwell on New Year's Day (6f); another solid effort when second of 14 over C&D two weeks later; 2lb higher today but there is a fair chance he hasn't reached his ceiling after just 12 starts."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sarab Star",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "115",

        "fair_odds": "8.51",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unexposed and progressive handicapper who has two wins and two seconds to his name from four AW appearances; lost little in defeat at Kempton 16 days ago when chasing home a smart rival who was winning the race for the fourth time; a stiff 6f should be fine but stall 1 might not be beneficial given the forecast of a brisk crosswind; stable also runs Ferrous."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "El Bodon",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Jane Chapple-Hyam",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "841-14",

        "stall": 10,

        "fair_odds": "8.65",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+8.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two 6f wins at Kempton this winter and he ran as well as he ever has when a close fourth at Lingfield five weeks ago (behind Ferrous and Lakers); this stiff 6f should suit and he can make another bold bid."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Lakers",

        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "96",

        "fair_odds": "11.51",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Impressed at Southwell last October when dropped back to 6f; two solid efforts in defeat this year and this stiff test at the trip should be beneficial; shortlisted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sir Les Patterson",
        "jockey": "Jack Kearney(3)",
        "trainer": "Stephen Thorne",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "107",
        "form": "3041-1",

        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-6.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent but talented when trained by Harry Eustace; on the up for his new stable, winning 6f handicaps in fine style last November and in February; could well have more to offer on AW but it will require a mighty performance to defy top weight in this field."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Ferrous",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "36-426",

        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "63.0",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.16",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Handicap mark not impossible judged on his C&D win last May off 3lb lower; running okay in defeat this winter and it would be no surprise to see him in the thick of the action."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Heathcliff",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "23-312",
        "sire": "Iffraaj",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "62.2",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.46",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner; running well in handicaps this winter before a fine second in Listed company at Wolverhampton four weeks ago; the 10lb hike for that will surely leave him vulnerable."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Berkshire Whisper",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "4024-0",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "62.0",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.76",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He was completing a hat-trick when landing the 3yo sprint on this card 12 months ago, a race where he enjoyed a clear run while several in behind met trouble; he hasn't looked ahead of the handicapper in three runs this winter but likely this has been the main target and he has been gelded since his latest run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Marshman",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "98",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "367-53",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "60.7",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.13",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Did well in early 2025 on AW, winning a C&D handicap in good style and following up in Listed company at Lingfield; finished third in the corresponding race 12 months ago when rated 5lb higher; running himself back into form this winter, most recently a close third over 7f four weeks ago, and he looks primed to give Clifford Lee a winning return to the saddle."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Valiant Force",
        "jockey": "Mikey Sheehy",
        "trainer": "Robson De Aguiar",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "215-15",
        "sire": "Malibu Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Quality Road",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "57.6",
        "model_pct": "4.2%",
        "fair_odds": "23.53",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sprung a huge shock in the 2023 Norfolk Stakes at Royal Ascot; all five wins since have come in small fields at Dundalk; has run well in handicaps off high marks at that track but others are more appealing in today's field; blinkered for the first time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Wiltshire",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "/7-065",
        "sire": "Aclaim",
        "dam_sire": "Azamour",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "24.81",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-7.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Smart form in 2024, including over C&D; only ran once in 2025 and he has finished out of the places in all three starts this year but that doesn't tell the whole story as he made some striking late headway into sixth over C&D in January; he has undergone wind surgery since last seen and now sports a tongue tie; looks on a dangerous mark and could be a major player if he can avoid forfeiting too much ground at the start."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "So Darn Hot",
        "jockey": "Ashley Lewis(5)",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "97",
        "form": "3135-0",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.5",
        "model_pct": "3.7%",
        "fair_odds": "26.95",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Met all sorts of trouble when down the field behind Berkshire Whisper here 12 months ago; beaten in races won by reopposing rivals in all three starts for his new stable this winter; edging down the weights and has a good apprentice booked but others still appeal more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Fivethousandtoone",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "60-932",

        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "54.2",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "36.03",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three-time C&D winner, including this race in 2024 off a 2lb higher mark, and he has shaped well on his last two starts; he will need luck if it gets congested up the stands' rail but too much ability to rule out."
      },
      {

        "rpr": "118",

        "stall": 6,

        "score": "50.9",
        "model_pct": "1.8%",
        "fair_odds": "54.23",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Often threatened to be high class on AW but it was on turf in Bahrain where he leapt to prominence, enjoying a fine time in early 2025; improving run by run for new stable but he was put in his place by Sir Les Patterson at Dundalk six weeks ago and an 8lb turnaround may be insufficient to turn the tables."
      }
    ]
  },
  {

        "spotlight": "Showed ability when fourth and third in a pair of maidens and improved to win over 1m1f on heavy at Leopardstown 166 days ago, beating Shamrock Flame by a neck; form of that questionable; down in trip on handicap debut; acts on good and heavy; yard won this last year."

      {
