        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Pulled 12l clear with next-time-out winner when landing a Killarney maiden in July; excuses next time out and landed an extended 1m1f handicap at Clonmel in good style on latest start 204 days ago; up 7lb but progressive in handicaps and should enjoy conditions; leading player."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark with easy win in Killarney maiden in October; string of solid efforts in maidens prior to that; beaten 7.75l into sixth over C&D in competitive handicap 152 days ago, shaping better due to traffic problems and being forced wide; interesting each-way contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improver in handicaps last season, landed C&D handicap off 6lb lower on final start, beating Great Mover by a head; never involved on return in Irish Lincoln 19 days ago but should come on for that."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Quatre Bras",

        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three-time winner on the AW who was out of form on turf last season; enjoyed a revival at Dundalk in recent months and proved as effective on turf when 0.5l second to Independent Expert on soft ground at Naas 12 days ago; step up to a mile suits and usually races off the pace."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "jockey": "Chris Hayes",
        "trainer": "John Andrew Kinsella",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "101",

        "stall": 11,

        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.29",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Very progressive in handicaps last season, two of his three wins coming here over 7f on ground with an ease; latest came in September when beating subsequent winner Tokenomics by 0.75l; may have hit his ceiling judged on return effort in Irish Lincoln (finished 14th) but could easily step forward for that."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Eight-time winner, sixth turf win last time when beating Quatre Bras by 0.5l at Naas over 7f 12 days ago on second start for new stable; needs to build on that off 4lb higher but could do; acts on all ground but wouldn't want it too soft over a mile."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual C&D winner who has proved very progressive in last 18 months; started winning a handicap at this track off 60 in October before winning impressively at Galway under a penalty six days later and second over C&D week after; benefitted from return run when scoring here six days ago, beating Electric Beauty by a neck; 7lb higher mark but race-fit and should go well."

        "spotlight": "Five-time winner, two on turf, both over a mile on good; in good form on the AW lately, won 1m4f handicap at Dundalk in February; 0.75l second to Unterberg 14 days ago on AW; needs a good pace to aim at and trip a bit sharp; soft ground would be a concern."

  {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He's on a competitive mark and his first run in blinkers last time at Southwell (1m) was better than it looks at first glance; could go well, for all that he's unraced here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Dingle",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Julie Camacho",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "102-17",
        "sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "dam_sire": "Daggers Drawn",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "54.8",
        "model_pct": "7.1%",
        "fair_odds": "14.14",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced since winning this last year off a 7lb lower mark; dictated steady fractions when winning his penultimate race at Newcastle (1m) and then well held off this rating at Southwell; may need everything to go like clockwork if he's to repeat last year's win off this higher mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Unassuming",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(5)",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "3-4505",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "52.3",
        "model_pct": "5.3%",
        "fair_odds": "18.81",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "4lb higher than her last winning mark but Jack Callan's claim will help in that respect and it was a good run last time at Wolverhampton (finished upside Exquisitive Acclaim) given she was never ideally positioned out the back; could go well provided stall 11 isn't a killer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Ben Lawers",
        "jockey": "Keithen Kennedy(5)",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "924-15",
        "sire": "Siyouni",
        "dam_sire": "Tamayuz",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.27",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seventh career run when winning a 1m AW maiden at Dundalk which he was entitled to at odds-on; only fifth back there on handicap debut but was never in the best place after starting slowly; may yet to have more to offer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Sous La Neige",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Gavin Hernon",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "974-20",
        "sire": "Shalaa",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "50.5",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.41",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-7.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "French raider with a strike-rate of 1-27; while that doesn't bode well, he finished like a train (from stall 11) to finish second in this last year (2lb higher) and he's not been beaten far in his last three races at Deauville."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "I Still Have Faith",
        "jockey": "Gina Mangan",
        "trainer": "Stuart Williams",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "20-826",
        "sire": "Expert Eye",
        "dam_sire": "Bahamian Bounty",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.67",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "From a wide draw he did plenty of early running to get his position at Wolverhampton (7f) two weeks ago and that softened him up in the finish; without a win since 2023, but well drawn, stays this far and a tongue-tie is added."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Sir Paul Ramsey",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "103",

        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.6",
        "model_pct": "2.7%",
        "fair_odds": "37.05",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fairly treated on the form he showed in some turf handicaps at the end of last summer, but 0-4 on the AW and his two runs after a break weren't overly encouraging as this represents a tougher test."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",
    "time": "4:10",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+11.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fourth in this last year on sole previous visit to Newcastle and he's now 3lb higher; went close on first two starts this winter before winning at Lingfield (1m4f) in February; could run well but may prefer a longer trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Gaucher",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "106",

        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-12",

        "model_pct": "13.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.71",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Represents top Irish jumps trainer Willie Mullins; won a Grade 3 hurdle at Tipperary last October and he's posted easy wins on the Dundalk AW on his last two starts (1m4f/10.6f); has a lofty mark to defy now back in a handicap but he may well prove capable in view of his impressive winter form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Regal Ulixes",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "17-616",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Medicean",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "65.2",
        "model_pct": "12.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.83",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-14.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Very lightly raced 4yo who made it 2-3 in this hood when winning readily at Lingfield (1m2f, Polytrack) in February; kept on from the rear for close sixth of 12 in the Lincoln Trial at Wolverhampton (8.6f, Tapeta) last month and he's firmly in calculations with the return to 1m2f a major plus."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Zryan",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "116",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "2-0126",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Green Desert",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "61.9",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.89",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Wolverhampton (9.4f) in December and over this C&D in January; below best at Wolverhampton (8.6f) latest and he's running in a higher grade than he's used to, but he has an each-way shout on the pick of his winter form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Midnight Lion",
        "jockey": "Lauren Young(5)",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "561-15",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Indian Ridge",
        "stall": 16,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "61.2",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.42",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "24 visits to Newcastle have yielded nine wins, seven over C&D; the latest came on New Year's Day when beating five rivals; fifth of 12 at Southwell since and could better that performance now back here, but there's a suspicion today's contest will prove too competitive."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Parlando",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "11-203",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "60.9",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "15.03",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two in a row in December (1m2f/9.4f) and he didn't enjoy an ideal run through when second to King's Code over C&D in January; another good performance when third at Kempton (1m4f) last month and this shorter trip may well be his optimum; could be thereabouts once more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Bragbor",
        "jockey": "Jamie Spencer",
        "trainer": "Richard & Peter Fahey",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "13224-",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Royal Applause",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "59.9",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.56",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two-time course winner who went close on his stable debut over C&D in November; things didn't go his way when fourth of 13 at Chelmsford (1m2f) ten days later; this very lightly raced 5yo goes well fresh and remains open to further improvement; could be a contender following a break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Nolton Cross",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Hugo Palmer",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "91",
        "form": "64/144",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "59.9",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.77",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six wins from his 23 AW starts, the latest at Wolverhampton (1m4f, Tapeta) in February; has continued in good form when fourth at Lingfield and Kempton on last two starts, but he may again be vulnerable today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Duke's Command",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "413-87",

        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 12,

        "score": "58.8",
        "model_pct": "4.8%",
        "fair_odds": "20.79",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Lingfield (Polytrack) in December on first crack at 1m2f; another big run when third of five in Listed race there (1m2f) next time; bounced back from lesser run when staying on for seventh of 12 at Wolverhampton (8.6f, Tapeta) recently and he could be in the mix now back up in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Brasil Power",
        "jockey": "Grace McEntee",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "106",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "-34416",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Arch",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "57.5",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "25.31",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three times in December (1m/1m4f) and continued in good form, getting back on the scoresheet in a five-runner handicap at Wolverhampton (1m6f, Tapeta) last month; didn't run badly over 2m at Kempton last Saturday; drops back in trip here and may find today's company to be too competitive."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Antrim",
        "jockey": "Sam James",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "98",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "1-4149",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.59",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won C&D novice in October for the Gosdens and followed up on stable debut in C&D handicap; added a dirt handicap win at Meydan in January; well beaten in Meydan Group 2 last time but this front-runner could make a bold bid now back in a handicap."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "The Glen Rovers",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Lucy Wadham",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "419-85",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "57.0",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "27.72",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five AW wins between July 2024 and February 2025, including here; however, he hasn't been at the top of his game on his three starts since November, which puts him down the pecking order today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Teumessias Fox",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "973-53",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Unbridled's Song",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "56.2",
        "model_pct": "3.2%",
        "fair_odds": "30.96",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Slow starts have become an unwelcome habit but he caught the eye keeping on for fifth of 13 behind King's Code over C&D in January, when denied a clear run; last of three at Lingfield since in a race that wasn't run to suit; each-way claims if getting the breaks."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "King's Code",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "David Evans",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "5-1568",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Dynaformer",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "54.7",
        "model_pct": "2.5%",
        "fair_odds": "39.29",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He's never won off a mark this high and he needs to produce more than he's managed at Kempton and Lingfield on his last three starts; however, before those he won a 13-runner handicap over C&D with something to spare and the return to Newcastle could be in his favour; not ruled out each-way."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Curragh",
    "time": "4:17",
    "race_name": "1xBet.ie Emerald Cup Handicap (Premier Handicap)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Soft",
    "class": "",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Eastwatch",
        "jockey": "Andrew Slattery",
        "trainer": "Andrew Slattery",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "7165-2",
        "sire": "Make Believe",
        "dam_sire": "Camelot",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "63.9",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.80",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-16.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual winner over 9.5f at Gowran last year (maiden/conditions race); failed to make an impact at Listed level next two starts over further; pulled clear with Ribee when runner-up in Irish Lincoln on return; shortlisted from 4lb higher."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Ribee",
        "jockey": "Gary Carroll",
        "trainer": "Michael Mulvany",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "311-15",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 16,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "61.6",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.43",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Enjoyed a terrific spell last October, notching three wins and two places during a hectic spell; maintained his rate of improvement when beating 24 rivals here in the Irish Lincoln on return; fine run came to an end in 10.5f Listed at Naas and he's probably better over shorter."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Starford",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "11217-",
        "sire": "Beckford",
        "dam_sire": "Manduro",
        "stall": 19,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "58.7",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.96",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "One of four for yard; progressive in handicaps last season, winning three of his last four; commanding win at Listowel in September off 90 (1m3f, heavy); folded tamely when sent off favourite for 1m4f Listed event here in November; will need to be in top order to defy 12lb higher mark on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Glen To Glen",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "98",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "34297-",
        "sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "dam_sire": "Intense Focus",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "58.0",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.65",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fourth runner for yard; won his maiden here over 6f but stayed this far when runner-up over C&D off 90 last July; landed Cork maiden hurdle in December before tailed off in Fred Winter at Cheltenham last month; handicapped to be involved back on the Flat."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Chica Guerrera",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "Mark Fahey",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "1B233-",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive City",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "57.1",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.54",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Stays 1m4f but dropped back to this trip effectively when a close third over C&D off 70 in October before filling the same spot here over 1m behind Titanium next time from 2lb out of the handicap; Wayne Lordan an eyecatching booking for return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Mocking",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "J P Murtagh",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "26301-",
        "sire": "Tamayuz",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "55.0",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.98",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Can be a tricky ride but justified market support when notching first win narrowly at Roscommon in October (10.5f, soft); wasn't beaten far in C&D handicap last summer from 2lb higher and ran well on return last season; considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Fiver Friday",
        "jockey": "Nathan Crosse",
        "trainer": "Gavin Cromwell",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "84503-",
        "sire": "The Gurkha",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "54.7",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.34",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four Flat wins and hurdle victory for Paul Traynor; fine yard debut third over C&D off 1lb higher in October; runner-up in pair of handicap hurdles at Thurles in the winter; stable in form and shortlisted despite being 1lb out of the handicap."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Comfort Zone",

        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "30003-",
        "sire": "Churchill",
        "dam_sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-8",

        "fair_odds": "20.09",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third runner for yard; three-time hurdle winner went close in 2m4f Ascot Stakes off 93 last June; stayed on for midfield finish in Irish Cesarewitch here in September; finished well when close third in 2m Naas handicap in October; this trip is on the short side."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Norwalk Havoc",
        "jockey": "Shane Foley",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "0210-7",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Kitten's Joy",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "53.0",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.56",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time winner at 7f/1m, including two Listed events at Leopardstown on heavy ground; returned with fair seventh of 25 here in Irish Lincoln behind Ribee; 1lb lower but stamina to prove back up in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Immutable",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "Joseph G Murphy",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "104",

        "fair_odds": "22.53",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden hurdle and three-time Flat winner; two tame efforts hurdling in the winter but ended last season with a fair fifth of 16 at Leopardstown over 1m4f off current mark; handles the mud; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Bay Colony",

        "ts": "83",

        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.08",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Highly tried at two; placed over 1m on return last season before landing fillies' maiden at Limerick (1m4f, soft to heavy) in April; never a factor at Listed/Group 1 level after; market will reveal expectations on handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Narlita",
        "jockey": "Siobhan Rutledge(3)",
        "trainer": "H Rogers",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "4314-5",

        "dam_sire": "Perugino",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "50.7",
        "model_pct": "4.2%",
        "fair_odds": "24.00",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Rewarded for her consistency with a Gowran win in October (1m4f, heavy) before signing off with close-up fourth at Galway; took the Irish Lincoln by the scruff of the neck on return when trying to make all, giving way late to finish fifth; step up in trip will suit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Coeur d'Or",
        "jockey": "Chris Hayes",
        "trainer": "D K Weld",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "04240-",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "50.6",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.20",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Smart sort is only 4-29 but has run well in defeat many times in quality races including when beaten 2.5l into fourth over C&D off 95 in October; this ground could be a bit too testing for him on return but the veteran could still go well."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Akecheta",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "Kevin Thomas Coleman",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "92",

        "dam_sire": "Dalakhani",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "50.3",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.58",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-6.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gained second heavy-ground win in conditions race at Gowran (7f) last September; yet to win a handicap but sent off the well-backed favourite for the Irish Lincoln on return; slow break cost her any chance; stays this far and folly to dismiss; Colin Keane remains loyal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Amplitude",
        "jockey": "Gavin Ryan",
        "trainer": "Joseph G Murphy",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "99",

        "dam_sire": "Oratorio",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.39",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Rounded off last term in style with an emphatic 6l win in Gowran maiden (9.5f, heavy), seemingly improving for first try on very testing ground; handicapper hasn't taken any chances with his opening mark but front-runner is respected all the same."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,

        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won on good to soft over 1m in France; gelded ahead of Irish debut but outran 80-1 odds in Irish Lincoln when never-nearer eighth of 25; fair chance of improvement up in trip; cheekpieces added."
      },

        "run_style": "",

        "spotlight": "Six-time winner on turf (including a premier handicap here over 1m in November off 10lb lower); sixth in Irish Lincoln on return when 1lb wrong; race possibly came too soon when below that level over same C&D six days ago."

        "spotlight": "Galway maiden winner over 7f at two; highly tried last season, notably in the 1,000 Guineas; kept on well in closing stages when tenth of 25 in Irish Lincoln on handicap bow last month but others preferred."

        "spotlight": "Second runner for yard; debut win here (6f) before going on to taste Group 3 success at Deauville (7f, good) in 2024; tried at Group 1 level after; struggled in three runs last season; tongue-tied ahead of return going up in trip."

  {
    "course": "Lingfield (AW)",

    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Alasrae",

        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "78",

        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 2-2 in a visor when winning narrowly at Kempton (6f) and kept on well for second over 5f at Wolverhampton despite running in just a tongue-tie (as here); 1lb higher but Jack Callan now takes over with his 5lb claim; considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Numero Vingt",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "82",

        "stall": 1,

        "score": "58.0",
        "model_pct": "13.9%",
        "fair_odds": "7.18",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+6.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All four runs over 6f; dead-heated in a Chelmsford maiden and narrowly defied a penalty here in a novice that's worked out well; made an underwhelming handicap debut at Southwell but he's back at Lingfield with cheekpieces added and well drawn to boot."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Mister Moet",
        "jockey": "Tyler Heard",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "65",

        "dam_sire": "Night Shift",

        "score": "57.5",

        "fair_odds": "7.83",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has won two of his last four races, both here over 6f and 5f; as with stablemate Mighty Vega, he could be vulnerable under a penalty in this higher grade."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Lord Harcourt",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "11-257",

        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "55.9",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.34",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-13.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back-to-back C&D wins in December and up against it from where he was when a close fifth back here in February; perhaps didn't take a liking to Southwell when below par there last time and could still be on the upgrade."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Space Bear",
        "jockey": "Harry Davies",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "64-232",

        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "55.9",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.36",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over 7f for Marco Botti but was effective at 6f, over which he finished second on stable debut here after a \u00a326,000 sale; respected off the same mark, for all that he's now into a Class 4."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Mighty Vega",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "-45521",

        "dam_sire": "Rahy",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.63",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won his novice over 6f (Polytrack) and added a 7f handicap here last week when well positioned throughout; that was from a wide draw as well but stall 11 spells danger back at 6f, and he's penalised."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "King Of Chaos",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Dylan Cunha",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "5-4215",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "52.8",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.30",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just the four races for current yard and showed improved form to win his maiden here over 7f; 6f should suit as he can be keen but he finished last over this far at Southwell (off this mark) and did some hanging."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Grey Horizon",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "131625",

        "dam_sire": "Outstrip",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.95",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five-time winner; had the run of things up front when second over C&D two runs back (some of these behind) and was beaten fair and square next time at Southwell; poorly drawn for one who enjoys being up with the pace."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Akabusi",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Mike Murphy",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "1522-9",
        "sire": "Mohaather",
        "dam_sire": "Alhaarth",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "4.8%",
        "fair_odds": "20.72",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won races for his two previous yards, over 6f on turf and Tapeta; twice close up behind Lord Harcourt here in December but finished last at Wolverhampton on stable debut after a break and he's drawn wide here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "U S S Charleston",
        "jockey": "Tom Kiely-Marshall(5)",
        "trainer": "Lemos De Souza",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "72",

        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "50.2",
        "model_pct": "3.7%",
        "fair_odds": "26.83",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it eighth-time lucky as a 2yo in a 5f nursery on Tapeta; not beaten far in 5f/6f handicaps here before an eyecatching third at Wolverhampton where he was dropped in from a wide draw; possibilities."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Alvin",
        "jockey": "Darragh Keenan",
        "trainer": "George Scott",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "56-418",

        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 9,

        "fair_odds": "27.52",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-9.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "It was a winnable 5f novice he took at Wolverhampton in February; eased down after a troubled passage on his handicap debut at Southwell (Class 2 over 6f; 11-1) but there's plenty of potential factored in with his current mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Henrythenate",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Hit the ground running for Stuart Williams with 5f wins here (under Jack Dace) but subsequent defeats suggest he's now high in the weights."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",
    "time": "4:42",
    "race_name": "Midnite All-Weather Easter Plate Marathon Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "2m",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Beylerbeyi",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "31-322",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "67.8",
        "model_pct": "21.7%",
        "fair_odds": "4.60",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-10.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won the 2m2f Cesarewitch in October and running really well in defeat on AW over 1m2f/1m3f (including here) this year, most recently second at Lingfield behind Regal Ulixes (declared 4:10); leading player back up in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Enemy",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "55-131",
        "sire": "Muhaarar",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "63.5",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.12",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+7.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Snapped a losing sequence at Southwell (1m4f, Tapeta) in January before close third at Wolverhampton (2m), and returned to winning ways at Lingfield (2m, Polytrack) latest; this 9yo is in a more competitive race today but there remains mileage in his mark judged on his old form; might not be far away."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Dramatic Star",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "104",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "2942-6",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Kitten's Joy",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "63.0",
        "model_pct": "11.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.72",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not quite at his best at Kempton last month but that came after 94 days off and he could improve for it; held up in slowly run race at Kempton in October when 2l fourth on his sole previous crack at 2m, and he may yet be capable of better at this sort of trip; has won here and could be involved."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In and out on his five runs since returning from an absence in October but he's won three of them, most recently at Lingfield (2m, Polytrack) in January; has also won on Tapeta; this steadily progressive 6yo has gone up just 2lb for last time and could again be involved; cheekpieces go on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "fair_odds": "10.38",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-7.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second in this in 2024 and fourth last year; won at Kempton (2m) in December and followed up by 3l over this C&D in January; this 6yo is on a career-high mark but is clearly thriving and has to be respected."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent since finishing second in the Northumberland Vase over C&D last June and well beaten over C&D in January, but back on song when second at Chelmsford (1m6f) in February; capable of a bold show in a first-time hood."

        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Wolverhampton (1m6f, Tapeta) in November and back on the scoresheet at Southwell (2m, Tapeta) three weeks ago; those wins were in Class 4 and he's back up in grade today off a career-high mark, but he did it readily last time and a 3lb rise isn't harsh; not ruled out."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won this in 2024 and he's dropping down the weights; this 8yo has shown the odd sign of spark over the last 12 months but his AW exploits this winter indicate it's best to look elsewhere."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Prominent racer who posted four wins in the second half of last year, including over C&D and at Southwell in December; however, he needs to produce more than he's managed on his last three starts."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made all at Kempton (2m, Polytrack) in January and head second to Berkshire Sundance at Lingfield (2m, Polytrack) later that month; not quite at the same level at Southwell (2m2f, Tapeta) last month but he failed to settle; Newcastle form figures read 12139 and he has an each-way shout."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Wolverhampton (1m6f, Tapeta) last July and is now just 1lb higher; however, he hasn't been at the top of his game on his three AW starts since December and needs something extra today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,

        "cd": "",

      }

        "spotlight": "Bids for a hat-trick after wins over 1m2f at Newcastle (Tapeta) and under Conor Whiteley at Doncaster (good to soft) six days ago; mark has gone up by the same amount as his penalty, so a player if seeing out the longer trip."
